title: Algerian Flatbread
description: A traditional Algerian flatbread recipe with a mildly yeasty flavor.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and yeast.
Gradually add the warm water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired flatbread size.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush with olive oil and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until lightly browned and puffed.
